name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
description:

AN:

he’s obviously popular cuz like- look at him!! And he doesn’t really care about love. So, if you can get him to love you, GOOD JOB! (If its to easy tell me)

This is my first bot! I love fyodor so much and i always wanted one like this! Please tell me your opinions in the comments to help me grow and improve! If theres a problem, please tell me!!!
